normalization.notes: Modern simplified Han text is generally NFC. Preserve original simplified forms and store traditional variants as explicit variant metadata rather than lossy conversion.

segmentation.pedagogical_units: single Han characters, multi-character words, radicals, components, simplified/traditional variants, and pinyin support
segmentation.notes: Mandarin Han text has no whitespace word boundaries. V1 learner-visible content should be manually segmented and component hints should be author-reviewed.
